commands.summary: Backend TypeScript build passed with approvalReplay assembling the ordered approval lifecycle and policy-driven redaction.

46 db/server tests passed, including AGH-017 ordered steps, full vs redacted detail, undecided-request replay, per-request chain verification, the operator-only route, 404 for unknown ids, and the redaction_profile preview.
Renderer TypeScript typecheck passed with the added ApprovalReplay/ReplayStep types.
Local audit passed after AGH-017 implementation and ledger updates.

environment.process_note: AGH-017: operator-only approval replay over already-stored governance records (request, risk, evidence, decision, outcomes, final state) with per-request audit-chain segment, chain verification, and redaction that only shows private detail on the desktop_full profile.
